segments: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مِنْ إِجْلَالِ اللَّهِ إِجْلَالُ ذِي الشَّيْبَةِ الْمُسْلِمِ .
arabic.text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مِنْ إِجْلَالِ اللَّهِ إِجْلَالُ ذِي الشَّيْبَةِ الْمُسْلِمِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of his companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘From the respecting of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is the respecting the Muslims with old age’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of his companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘From the respecting of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is the respecting the Muslims with old age’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain individuals of his people from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Of high regard toward Allah, is having high regard for a Muslim who has grown a beard.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain individuals of his people from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Of high regard toward Allah, is having high regard for a Muslim who has grown a beard.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/ 9)
gradings.label: حسن كالصحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/ 9)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ لَمْ يُوَقِّرْ كَبِيرَنَا وَ يَرْحَمْ صَغِيرَنَا .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ لَمْ يُوَقِّرْ كَبِيرَنَا وَ يَرْحَمْ صَغِيرَنَا .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, raising it, said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He is not from us, the one who does not revere (respect) our elderly and being merciful to our young ones’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, raising it, said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He is not from us, the one who does not revere (respect) our elderly and being merciful to our young ones’.

segments: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad in a marfu’ manner from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever does not consider our elders as dignified and does not show kindness to our people who are yet to grow up, is not from our people.”
en.sarwar.text: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad in a marfu’ manner from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever does not consider our elders as dignified and does not show kindness to our people who are yet to grow up, is not from our people.”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/ 9)
gradings.label: مرفوع
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/ 9)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ رَفَعَهُ قَالَ

segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَظِّمُوا كِبَارَكُمْ وَ صِلُوا أَرْحَامَكُمْ وَ لَيْسَ تَصِلُونَهُمْ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ أَفْضَلَ مِنْ كَفِّ الْأَذَى عَنْهُمْ .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَظِّمُوا كِبَارَكُمْ وَ صِلُوا أَرْحَامَكُمْ وَ لَيْسَ تَصِلُونَهُمْ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ أَفْضَلَ مِنْ كَفِّ الْأَذَى عَنْهُمْ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdullah Bin Aban, from Al Wassafy who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Revere your elderly, and have goodly relations with your relatives, and you will not be helping them with anything more superior than stopping the harm from them’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdullah Bin Aban, from Al Wassafy who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Revere your elderly, and have goodly relations with your relatives, and you will not be helping them with anything more superior than stopping the harm from them’.

segments: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Abd Allah ibn Aban from al-Wassafi who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Consider your grown up people as great and maintain good relations with relatives. No other way is better to maintain good relations with relatives than keeping all troubles away from them.’”
en.sarwar.text: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Abd Allah ibn Aban from al-Wassafi who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Consider your grown up people as great and maintain good relations with relatives. No other way is better to maintain good relations with relatives than keeping all troubles away from them.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/8)
gradings.label: حسن كالصحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/8)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَبَانٍ عَنِ الْوَصَّافِيِّ قَالَ
